calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion Re Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514; Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Ann Delgado, #11185; Telephone: 415-551-0334.

Drew F. Teti, Esq, appeared with plaintiff Vakim Fedotov, who was placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff Diana Furka was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Coterie, inc., d/b/a Glamrush, Inc., a California Corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on December 21, 2015.
Dismissal without prejudice of the DOE defendants was filed with the Clerk's Office on March 2, 2016.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Diana Furka and Vadim Fedotov, and against the Defaulted Defendant Coterie, Inc., d/b/a Glamrush, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $81,821.01. (Plaintiff Diana Furka).
Damages/Principal - $81,821.01. (Plaintiff Vakim Fedotov).
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived, for a total judgment in the amount of $163,642.02.

Plaintiffs' counsel shall prepare the proposed judgment and submit same to the Court for review & signature.

Motion To Strike Answer And Enter Default
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Oct-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
